sigWerErrors.reason: 'habra' (there will be) and 'hablar' (to speak) are completely different verbs and change the meaning of the sentence significantly.
The insertion of 'con' (with) after 'hablar' further changes the meaning, making the sentence about speaking with something instead of asking if there is something.
